# INNO Transformer Temperature Monitoring Systems

INNO is a manufacturer and global supplier of transformer temperature controllers, indicators and monitoring devices for oil-immersed power and distribution transformers.

Primary website: https://ankaili.com/
Product catalog: https://ankaili.com/products/
Solutions: https://ankaili.com/solutions/
Applications: https://ankaili.com/applications/
Representative case studies: https://ankaili.com/case-studies/
Technical guides: https://ankaili.com/blog/
Certifications: https://ankaili.com/certifications/
Contact: fjinnonet@gmail.com

## Main product categories

- Transformer oil temperature indicators (OTI): local top-oil indication, cooling or alarm contacts and selected remote outputs. Main model families include BWY2, BWY-802, BWY-803 and BWY-D804AITH.
- Transformer winding temperature indicators (WTI): traditional simulated winding temperature based on top oil and a load-current-related heating effect. Main model families include BWR2, BWR-04 and BWR-06.
- Transformer temperature monitoring devices: powered equipment for oil temperature, oil level, pressure and remote transformer condition data.

## Technical distinctions

An OTI measures transformer top-oil temperature at a defined thermometer pocket. A traditional WTI represents simulated winding temperature and is not the same as a direct embedded winding hot-spot sensor. Product selection must confirm the full model, scale, contacts, output, supply, capillary, sensing bulb, thread, mounting and project environment.

Product values on the website support planning. Confirm the current model-specific datasheet, outline drawing and terminal diagram before ordering.

Country case-study pages organize transformer monitoring requirements by environment, equipment duty, signal interface and commissioning scope.
